faqs.question: What is GEO Optimizer?
faqs.answer: GEO Optimizer is an open-source Python toolkit that audits websites for AI search engine visibility. It scores sites 0-100 based on 47 research-backed methods and generates fixes for robots.txt, llms.txt, JSON-LD schema, and meta tags. Install with: pip install geo-optimizer-skill

faqs.question: How is the GEO score calculated?
faqs.answer: The GEO score (0-100) is calculated across 8 categories: robots.txt AI bot access (18 points), llms.txt presence and quality (18), JSON-LD schema richness (16), meta tags (14), content quality (12), technical signals like lang and RSS (6), AI discovery endpoints (6), and brand & entity signals (10). Bands: 86-100 excellent, 68-85 good, 36-67 foundation, 0-35 critical.

faqs.question: What are the 47 GEO methods?
faqs.answer: GEO Optimizer measures content citability using 47 methods based on Princeton KDD 2024, AutoGEO ICLR 2026, and SE Ranking 2025 research. Top methods by impact: Quotation Addition +41%, Statistics +33%, Fluency +29%, Cite Sources +27%, Answer-First +25%, Passage Density +23%. v4.1.0 added 5 RAG readiness checks: Answer Capsule Detection, Token Efficiency, Entity Resolution, Knowledge Graph Density, and Retrieval Trigger Patterns.

faqs.question: How do I use GEO Optimizer with Claude or Cursor?
faqs.answer: GEO Optimizer includes an MCP server with 10 tools. Install with: pip install geo-optimizer-skill[mcp], then: claude mcp add geo-optimizer -- geo-mcp. You can then ask Claude to audit sites, generate fixes, and analyze citability directly.

faqs.question: Can I run GEO audits in CI/CD?
faqs.answer: Yes. Use the GitHub Action: uses: Auriti-Labs/geo-optimizer-skill@v1 with url and threshold inputs. Supports SARIF output for GitHub Security tab and JUnit for Jenkins/GitLab. Fails the build if score drops below threshold.

faqs.question: What AI bots does GEO Optimizer track?
faqs.answer: GEO Optimizer tracks 27 AI bots across 3 tiers: training (GPTBot, anthropic-ai, Google-Extended, Applebot-Extended, cohere-ai, Bytespider, CCBot, and more), search/citation (OAI-SearchBot, ClaudeBot, Claude-SearchBot, PerplexityBot, Bingbot, xAI-Bot, DuckAssistBot, YouBot, Amazonbot), and user-fetch (ChatGPT-User, Perplexity-User, Meta-ExternalFetcher, facebookexternalhit). Critical citation bots: OAI-SearchBot, ClaudeBot, Claude-SearchBot, PerplexityBot.
